results.label: 00_sanity_denominators_and_dedupe
results.sql: SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, count(*) AS rows_all, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_primary) AS rows_primary, sum(char_length(original)) FILTER (WHERE is_primary)/1e6 AS mchar_primary FROM passages GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 01_matika_paramattha_density_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'paramatth|sabhāv|cetasik|cetasikā|ārammaṇ|ārammaṅ|nipphann|anipphann|nippariyāy|salakkhaṇ|salakkhan|sāmaññalakkhaṇ|paccupaṭṭhān|padaṭṭhān') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit) AS hit_rows, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric / (sum(L)/1e6) AS hits_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 02_matika_cetasikadef_density_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'abhiniropan|āropan|anumajjan|\mvitakk|\mvicār|ekaggat|cittekaggat|yonisomanasikār|manasikār|saññā|saṅkhār|sankhār|saṃkhār|saṁkhār') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric / (sum(L)/1e6) AS hits_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 03_katame_frame_density_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'katame\s+dhammā|\mkatamo|\mkatamā|\mkatamaṃ|\mkatamaṁ|katamañ|tattha\s+katam|idaṃ\s+vuccati|idaṁ\s+vuccati|ime\s+vuccanti|ayaṃ\s+vuccati|ayaṁ\s+vuccati') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric / (sum(L)/1e6) AS hits_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 04_positive_lexicon_density_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'dukkhasacc|dukkhanirodh|nirodhasacc|samudayasacc|maggasacc|ariyasacc|paṭiccasamuppād|paticcasamuppad|avijjāpaccayā|\mjhān|paṭhamajjhān|dutiyajjhān|tatiyajjhān|catutthajjhān|jhānaṅg') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric / (sum(L)/1e6) AS hits_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 05_negative_control_density_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* '\mseyyathāpi|seyyathidaṃ|seyyathidaṁ|upamā|opamm|\mviya\M|sadis|\mānand|sāriputt|moggallān|mahākassap|jetavan|sāvatthi') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric / (sum(L)/1e6) AS hits_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 06_negcontrol_structural_via_tags
results.sql: SELECT stratum(p.work_slug) AS strat, p.work_role, pt.tag_type, count(DISTINCT p.id) AS tagged_rows, sum(char_length(p.original))/1e6 AS mchar, count(DISTINCT p.id)::numeric/(sum(char_length(p.original))/1e6) AS tagged_per_mchar FROM passages p JOIN passage_tags pt ON pt.passage_id = p.id WHERE p.is_primary AND pt.tag_type IN ('simile','name') GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY 1,2,3;

results.label: 07_per_work_density_for_gini_lorenz_CANON
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT work_slug, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'paramatth|sabhāv|cetasik|ārammaṇ|nipphann|salakkhaṇ|paccupaṭṭhān|padaṭṭhān|abhiniropan|\mvitakk|\mvicār|saṅkhār|katame\s+dhammā|\mkatamo|idaṃ\s+vuccati|idaṁ\s+vuccati') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary AND work_role='mula' AND work_slug <> 'pli-vism') SELECT work_slug, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit) AS hit_rows, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS matika_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY work_slug HAVING sum(L) > 20000 ORDER BY matika_per_mchar DESC;

results.label: 08_per_work_density_POSITIVE_for_gini_compare
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT work_slug, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'ariyasacc|dukkhasacc|nirodhasacc|maggasacc|paṭiccasamuppād|paticcasamuppad|avijjāpaccayā|\mjhān|paṭhamajjhān|catutthajjhān|jhānaṅg') AS hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary AND work_role='mula' AND work_slug <> 'pli-vism') SELECT work_slug, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE hit))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS positive_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY work_slug HAVING sum(L) > 20000 ORDER BY positive_per_mchar DESC;

results.label: 09_cooccurrence_2of3_khandha_ayatana_dhatu_per_stratum
results.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT id, work_slug, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'khandh|rūpakkhandh|rupakhandh|saṅkhārakkhandh|viññāṇakkhandh')::int AS g_khandha, (original ~* 'āyatan|ayatan|saḷāyatan|salāyatan')::int AS g_ayatana, (original ~* '\mdhātu|dhātuyo|dhātuso')::int AS g_dhatu FROM passages WHERE is_primary) SELECT stratum(work_slug) AS strat, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (g_khandha+g_ayatana+g_dhatu) >= 2) AS corr_rows, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (g_khandha+g_ayatana+g_dhatu) >= 2))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS corr2of3_per_mchar FROM d GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

results.label: 10_prongB_mula_attha_pairs_scaffold_delta
results.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT regexp_replace(work_slug,'-attha$','') AS sutta_key, work_role, work_slug, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'katame\s+dhammā|idaṃ\s+vuccati|idaṁ\s+vuccati|paramatth|sabhāv|cetasik|abhiniropan|salakkhaṇ|paccupaṭṭhān')::int AS matika_hit, ((original ~* 'khandh|rūpakkhandh|rupakhandh')::int + (original ~* 'āyatan|ayatan')::int + (original ~* '\mdhātu')::int) AS axes FROM passages WHERE is_primary AND (work_role='mula' OR work_role='attha') AND work_slug <> 'pli-vism'), agg AS (SELECT sutta_key, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (sum(matika_hit))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS matika_per_mchar, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE axes>=2))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS scaffold_per_mchar FROM base GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT m.sutta_key, m.matika_per_mchar AS mula_matika, a.matika_per_mchar AS attha_matika, (a.matika_per_mchar - m.matika_per_mchar) AS matika_delta, m.scaffold_per_mchar AS mula_scaffold, a.scaffold_per_mchar AS attha_scaffold, (a.scaffold_per_mchar - m.scaffold_per_mchar) AS scaffold_delta FROM agg m JOIN agg a ON a.sutta_key=m.sutta_key AND m.work_role='mula' AND a.work_role='attha' WHERE m.mchar > 0.01 ORDER BY (m.matika_per_mchar) ASC, scaffold_delta DESC;

results.label: 11_prongB_positive_lexicon_delta_same_pairs
results.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT regexp_replace(work_slug,'-attha$','') AS sutta_key, work_role, char_length(original) AS L, (original ~* 'ariyasacc|dukkhasacc|paṭiccasamuppād|paticcasamuppad|\mjhān|jhānaṅg')::int AS pos_hit FROM passages WHERE is_primary AND (work_role='mula' OR work_role='attha') AND work_slug <> 'pli-vism'), agg AS (SELECT sutta_key, work_role, sum(L)/1e6 AS mchar, (sum(pos_hit))::numeric/(sum(L)/1e6) AS pos_per_mchar FROM base GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT m.sutta_key, m.pos_per_mchar AS mula_pos, a.pos_per_mchar AS attha_pos, (a.pos_per_mchar - m.pos_per_mchar) AS pos_delta FROM agg m JOIN agg a ON a.sutta_key=m.sutta_key AND m.work_role='mula' AND a.work_role='attha' WHERE m.mchar > 0.01 ORDER BY pos_delta DESC;

results.label: 12_coding_sample_rows_attha_readback_candidates
results.sql: SELECT p.id, p.work_slug, p.work_role, left(p.original, 600) AS original_snippet, left(coalesce(p.translation,''), 600) AS translation_snippet FROM passages p WHERE p.is_primary AND p.work_role='attha' AND p.work_slug <> 'pli-vism' AND p.original ~* '(katame\s+dhammā|idaṃ\s+vuccati|idaṁ\s+vuccati)' AND ((p.original ~* 'khandh')::int + (p.original ~* 'āyatan|ayatan')::int + (p.original ~* '\mdhātu')::int) >= 2 ORDER BY md5(p.id::text) LIMIT 120;

results.sql: WITH centroid AS (SELECT avg(embedding) AS c FROM passages WHERE is_primary AND stratum(work_slug)='3abh' AND embedding IS NOT NULL) SELECT stratum(p.work_slug) AS strat, p.work_role, avg(1 - (p.embedding <=> c.c)) AS mean_cos_to_abh_centroid, count(*) AS n FROM passages p, centroid c WHERE p.is_primary AND p.embedding IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY mean_cos_to_abh_centroid DESC;
